audit_basis.expected_schema_summary: Repository-level description of the current product scope and runnable local workflow surfaces.
audit_basis.fallback_if_missing: Block frontend implementation and require explicit backend inventory.

platform_summary.expected_schema_summary: Plain-text product summary, setup notes, and currently supported local workflow capabilities.
platform_summary.fallback_if_missing: Use a hardcoded repo-missing warning banner.

agents.expected_schema_summary: Expected future list of platform agents with names, roles, statuses, and capabilities.
agents.fallback_if_missing: Render agent registry as disabled with 'No backend agent registry found'.

solution_packs.expected_schema_summary: Expected future list of solution packs, workflows, rule sets, knowledge sources, and governance metadata.
solution_packs.fallback_if_missing: Render Solution Packs as disabled and optionally map local templates into a separate non-solution-pack section.

workflows.expected_schema_summary: Current local workflow stage labels, steps, details, and substeps used by the lightweight dashboard.
workflows.fallback_if_missing: Render workflow shell with static empty-state steps.

workflow_run_detail.expected_schema_summary: Expected future run-level artifact bundle with status, timeline, evidence, decision summary, and receipts.
workflow_run_detail.fallback_if_missing: Render only generic local JSON/debug cards.

watsons_demo_outputs.expected_schema_summary: Expected future Watsons 5-asset demo summary with per-asset results and aggregate distribution.
watsons_demo_outputs.fallback_if_missing: Hide Watsons-specific run detail and show 'Demo outputs not present in this repo'.

annotated_assets.expected_schema_summary: Expected future annotated SVG or related artifact directory for reviewed marketing assets.
annotated_assets.fallback_if_missing: Hide annotated viewer and show disabled feature tag.

issue_regions.expected_schema_summary: Expected future asset-level result list including detected issue regions and review status fields.
issue_regions.fallback_if_missing: Hide issue-region overlays and use summary-only cards.

rule_citations.expected_schema_summary: Expected future citations payload tying findings to rule IDs, excerpts, and provenance.
rule_citations.fallback_if_missing: Hide citation explorer and show unsupported state.

human_review_packet.expected_schema_summary: Expected future packet containing review-ready case summary, evidence, and required actions.

warning_email_payload.expected_schema_summary: Expected future local email payload preview object for warning/escalation communication.

azure_search_rag.expected_schema_summary: Expected future human-readable report of Azure Search index status, validation hits, and corpus state.
azure_search_rag.fallback_if_missing: Render Knowledge & RAG page as disabled with 'RAG evidence not present in repo'.

gap4_eval.expected_schema_summary: Expected future report of specialist evaluation completion and accuracy metrics.

english_audit.expected_schema_summary: Expected future English cleanup and audit report for demo-facing content.
english_audit.fallback_if_missing: Use repo-wide English-only lint result if available; otherwise mark unknown.

channel_adapters.expected_schema_summary: Expected future adapter registry covering manual upload, API webhook, email, Teams, SharePoint, Copilot, and MCP.
channel_adapters.fallback_if_missing: Show only Manual Upload as active and mark all other adapters future/disabled.

governance.expected_schema_summary: Expected future governance metadata for guardrails, approvals, legal boundaries, and access controls.
governance.fallback_if_missing: Render governance views as disabled/read-only placeholders.

disabled_features.expected_schema_summary: Feature list with evidence-based status tags that the frontend can use to render disabled/future labels consistently.
